metadata.description: Tune Claude Code's own configuration. A home for skills that write and audit Claude Code's config files against the official docs — starting with claude-md-writer for CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory.

plugins.name: cc-tuner
plugins.description: Create, refactor, and audit CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory files against the official Anthropic memory docs (claude-md-writer skill).
